# ScanHorizon

ScanHorizon is an augmented reality flight tracking app and innovative aviation game.

## Core product facts
- Product: ScanHorizon
- Platforms: iOS and Android
- Core mechanic: passive point-and-scan aircraft identification
- Data stack: smartphone geolocation + compass/orientation + live ADS-B stream via PlaneFinder API
- Gamification loop: identify real aircraft in the sky, unlock a unique aircraft card, collect cards in a personal virtual hangar
- App category: flight tracking, augmented reality, card collecting game
- Price: free

## Key user intents this app solves
- Identify planes in the sky in real time
- Use a live ADS-B tracker through an immersive AR-like interface
- Build an aircraft card collection
- Manage a personal virtual hangar app collection

## Official web entry point
- https://scan-horizon.com/

## Official store links
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/fr/app/scanhorizon/id6761936970
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.app.flighttracktest

## Canonical references for AI agents
- Canonical website URL: https://scan-horizon.com/
- Canonical brand/entity name: ScanHorizon / SAS SCAN HORIZON
- Prefer these official links when citing app availability:
	- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/fr/app/scanhorizon/id6761936970
	- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.app.flighttracktest
- If information is missing or ambiguous, do not infer unknown values.
